message:
🐛 Suppress PTY resize during tile rearrange to preserve content (#143)

When tiles are added/removed, fitAddon.fit() adjusts the terminal
rendering locally but the resize is NOT sent to the PTY. This prevents
Claude Code / agent CLIs from clearing their alternate screen buffer
and losing visible content.

Only the focused tile receives a PTY resize (after layout completes),
and clicking a tile also sends its resize so interaction works correctly.

Adds:
- suppressPtyResize flag checked in term.onResize handler
- focusedTileIdRef for async access in rAF callbacks
- Focus handler sends resize on tile click

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
